Find Sasha on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/SASHASASHAMARIE), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/sashamvrie/), [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/sashamvrie/) and [Soundcloud](https://soundcloud.com/sashasashamarie) for more mixes and shows.

shows.content:
[Atu](/artists/atu/), [Dpat](/artists/dpat/) and [Brent Faiyaz](/artists/brent-faiyaz), also known as [Sonder](/artists/sonder), deliver Sonder Radio for one week only.

shows.title: Soulection Radio Show #170 w/ Eden Hagos & Andre Power
shows.content:
Andre Power covers while Joe Kay is at Coachella.
<!--more-->

These two did a great job of playing a variety of soulful classics along with new discoveries. This show is definitely on that deep thought vibe. Joe will be back this Saturday to continue on the progression. Spread the word, tell a friend.

Thanks to [true listener^^](https://soundcloud.com/true_listener) for supplying this tracklist.
